item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path

path = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json')
data = json.loads(path.read_text())
for key, value in data.items():
    print(f'{key}: type={type(value).__name__} value={value"'!r}'"')
print('queue_order=' + ' -> '.join(data['queues']))
assert type(data['schema_version']) is int
assert type(data['mode']) is str
assert type(data['max_parallel']) is int
assert type(data['owner']) is str
assert type(data['queues']) is list
assert all(type(queue) is str for queue in data['queues'])
assert data['queues'] == ['new', 'retry']
print('RESULT=PASS')
PY"
